patches.hypothesis: Refine the weighted sum formula, normalize weights, and add edge case handling to cover unusual input values
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the incorrect calculation of the weighted sum of the squared deviations. The formula used assumes that the weights are to be treated as 'expansion values', but in this case, the weights are not normalized to sum up to the length of the input vector minus one, which is the denominator in the variance computation. To fix this, the weights must be normalized by dividing them by the sum of all weights.
